compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, AI-driven light intensity optimization, DLI management
compatible_devices.notes: Compatible with any LED fixture that has a 0-10V or 0-5V dimming input. 1 channel per module; up to 200 LEDs per module via daisy chain. Up to 16,000 LEDs when modules are chained. Manufacturer confirms both 0-10V and 0-5V protocols.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: FC series, FC-E series, TSL series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, AI-driven light intensity optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Mars Hydro FC, FC-E, and TSL series support 0-10V dimming via dedicated dimming port. Compatibility inferred from 0-10V protocol standard; not explicitly confirmed by GrowDirector.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: SE series, G series, SF-X series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, AI-driven light intensity optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Spider Farmer SE, G, and higher-end SF series support 0-10V dimming. Compatibility inferred from 0-10V standard; not explicitly confirmed by GrowDirector.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: Zeus series, Attis series, ATA series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, AI-driven light intensity optimization
compatible_devices.notes: Lumatek Zeus and Attis LED series support 0-10V dimming via bare-wire dimming port. Compatibility inferred from 0-10V protocol standard; not explicitly confirmed by GrowDirector.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1700e LED, Pro 2000e LED, Pro 3100e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita e-Series LED Adapter (HGC906151) or equivalent 0-10V to RJ14 adapter
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, AI-driven light intensity
compatible_devices.notes: Gavita e-Series LED fixtures use RJ14 daisy-chain connectors for 0-10V dimming. An adapter (e.g. Gavita HGC906151) is required to interface with a standard 0-10V output. Proprietary RS-485 features (status feedback, per-fixture monitoring via Gavita Master Controller EL3) are NOT available via 0-10V.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: SPYDR series, VYPR series, RAZR series, RAY series, RAPTR series
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 0-10V analog (3-pin M16 or 3-pin M12 connector on fixture)
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: 3-pin M16 to 0-10V bare-wire adapter cable (older models) or 3-pin M12 to 0-10V adapter cable (newer models)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, AI-driven light intensity optimization
compatible_devices.notes: All Fluence fixtures support 0-10V dimming but use proprietary 3-pin M16 (older) or 3-pin M12 (newer) connectors. An adapter cable is required to interface with the DimmerDirector 0-10V output. Daisy chain supports up to 50 fixtures (exceptions apply to first-gen SPYDR, max 10).

Only HID electronic ballasts with a 0-10V dimming input are compatible. Magnetic ballasts and non-dimmable electronic ballasts are NOT compatible. GrowDirector markets DimmerDirector as an LED controller; HID ballast compatibility is inferred from 0-10V protocol. Dimming range limited by ballast specifications.
